candidates.why: Dedicated R&D operating expense above operating loss; since selected SG&A bucket is only G&A, this should also be included so XSGA-XRD removes it.
R&D-related row, but appears to be a component/subdetail of the broader R&D total in 2020, so less preferred for SG&A coverage.
Explicit SG&A-style overhead row; preferred under the SG&A hierarchy.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Overhead component, but inferior to the explicit G&A row when that row exists.
Operating overhead-like component, but narrower and not needed when explicit G&A exists.
Headcount metric on balance sheet, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A row plus separate R&D row because R&D is disclosed separately above operating loss and is not clearly embedded in the chosen G&A row. Excluded labor/external-cost components because an explicit populated SG&A row exists, and excluded D&A subrows.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense row above operating loss; best match.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Only the D&A subcomponent of R&D, not total R&D expense.
Also an R&D line, but appears to be a component/detail relative to the broader total R&D row.

variables.notes: Using R&D labels as a priority list. The broader 'Research and development expenses' row is preferred; 'Research & Development Expense' is retained as fallback for label variation across years. Excluded the D&A-in-R&D subcomponent.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line, but likely includes FX and other items; less preferred than interest-specific rows.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense; best conceptual match.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded 'Financial expenses' because it appears to include non-interest items such as foreign exchange and balancing amounts, creating double-counting risk if combined with components.

candidates.why: Best book equity line; preferable to generic Total Equity and excludes any need to add MIB separately if no NCI exists.
